case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. ROSE A JOHNSON

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSE A SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-18-2020
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $294.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSE A
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED OCT-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSE A
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200000953), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED OCT-07-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSE A
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585 (D) (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, ROSE A $3,062.93 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,357.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 200017720)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-27-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
